items.title: The Dow and S&P 500 Are in the Red
items.description: The Dow and S&P 500 are now headed for losses for the day. The Dow is down 0.6% while the S&P 500 is down 0.02%. A day in the red would break their three-day winning streaks. The Nasdaq is showing no signs of relenting with a 0.

items.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Honeywell Intl, Lowers Price Target to $215
items.description: Wells Fargo  analyst Joseph O'Dea   maintains Honeywell Intl (NASDAQ:HON) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $218 to $215.

items.title: 4 Diversified Operations Stocks to Watch Despite Industry Headwinds
items.description: The prospects of the Zacks Diversified Operations industry are hindered by weaknesses in the manufacturing sector and ongoing supply chain challenges. HON, MMM, CIB and ITT are notable stocks in the industry.
